query:
-- Property Owners table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `property_owners` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `phone2` varchar(30),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `nationalId` varchar(20),
  `bankName` varchar(100),
  `bankIban` varchar(50),
  `address` text,
  `notes` text,
  `managementFeeType` enum('percentage','fixed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'percentage',
  `managementFeeValue` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 5.00,
  `hasPortalAccess` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Brokers table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `brokers` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320),
  `licenseNumber` varchar(50),
  `commissionRates` json,
  `notes` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `hasPortalAccess` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Units table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `units` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `propertyId` int NOT NULL,
  `unitNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `floor` int,
  `type` enum('apartment','room','shop','office','warehouse','studio') NOT NULL,
  `area` decimal(10,2),
  `bedrooms` int,
  `bathrooms` int,
  `rentPrice` decimal(15,2),
  `status` enum('vacant','occupied','maintenance','reserved') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'vacant',
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Tenants table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenants` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `phone2` varchar(30),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `nationalId` varchar(20),
  `nationality` varchar(50),
  `occupation` varchar(100),
  `emergencyContact` varchar(30),
  `notes` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Contracts table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contracts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contractNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `type` enum('rent','sale','management') NOT NULL,
  `propertyId` int,
  `unitId` int,
  `tenantId` int,
  `ownerId` int,
  `rentAmount` decimal(15,2),
  `rentPeriod` enum('monthly','quarterly','semi_annual','annual') DEFAULT 'annual',
  `startDate` date,
  `endDate` date,
  `depositAmount` decimal(15,2),
  `salePrice` decimal(15,2),
  `managementFeeType` enum('percentage','fixed'),
  `managementFeeValue` decimal(8,2),
  `status` enum('active','expired','terminated','pending','renewed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `notes` text,
  `documents` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Payments table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `payments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contractId` int,
  `tenantId` int,
  `propertyId` int,
  `unitId` int,
  `ownerId` int,
  `type` enum('rent','deposit','maintenance_fee','management_fee','commission','other') NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `dueDate` date NOT NULL,
  `paidDate` date,
  `paymentMethod` enum('bank_transfer','cash','check','online'),
  `referenceNumber` varchar(100),
  `status` enum('pending','paid','overdue','partial','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `notes` text,
  `receiptUrl` varchar(500),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Expenses table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `expenses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `propertyId` int,
  `unitId` int,
  `ownerId` int,
  `category` enum('maintenance','utilities','insurance','tax','management','cleaning','security','other') NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `expenseDate` date NOT NULL,
  `paidBy` enum('company','owner','tenant') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'company',
  `deductFromOwner` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `receiptUrl` varchar(500),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Maintenance Requests table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `maintenance_requests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `propertyId` int,
  `unitId` int,
  `tenantId` int,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `status` enum('open','in_progress','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `assignedTo` varchar(255),
  `cost` decimal(15,2),
  `completedDate` date,
  `images` json,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Owner Statements table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `owner_statements` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ownerId` int NOT NULL,
  `period` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `totalRentCollected` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalExpenses` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `managementFee` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `netAmount` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('draft','sent','paid') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Broker Commissions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `broker_commissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `brokerId` int NOT NULL,
  `propertyId` int,
  `contractId` int,
  `transactionType` enum('sale','rent') NOT NULL,
  `transactionAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `commissionRate` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `commissionAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','paid','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `paidDate` date,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

-- Notifications table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notifications` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int,
  `type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `isRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Update properties table to add new columns
ALTER TABLE `properties`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ownerId` int AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `brokerId` int AFTER `ownerId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `source` enum('company','broker','owner') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'company' AFTER `brokerId`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `brokerCommissionRate` decimal(5,2) AFTER `negotiable`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `brokerCommissionAmount` decimal(15,2) AFTER `brokerCommissionRate`;

-- Update users table to add portal role columns
ALTER TABLE `users`
  MODIFY COLUMN `role` enum('user','admin','owner','broker') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `profileId` int AFTER `role`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `profileType` enum('owner','broker') AFTER `profileId`;

-- Update properties listingType to include 'managed'
ALTER TABLE `properties`
  MODIFY COLUMN `listingType` enum('sale','rent','managed') NOT NULL;

-- Update properties status to match new schema
ALTER TABLE `properties`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `status` enum('available','rented','sold','under_management','reserved','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available' AFTER `listingType`;

-- Update leads source enum
ALTER TABLE `leads`
  MODIFY COLUMN `source` enum('telegram','website','whatsapp','phone','referral') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'telegram';
